description:
As a Security Consultant, perform a complete security audit of the running Tor Browser installation. Document the Application Name, Version number, User Agent string, installed extensions (specifically noting NoScript's status), the current Security Level (Standard/Safer/Safest), and the HTTPS-Only Mode status. Additionally, verify the Tor connection status and Exit IP address. Compile all findings into a plain-text report saved to /home/ga/Documents/tor-audit-report.txt using the following structure:

=== TOR BROWSER SECURITY AUDIT REPORT ===

--- Application Info ---
Application: [name]
Version: [version number]
User Agent: [full user agent string]

--- Installed Extensions ---
[extension name]: [enabled/disabled]

--- Security Settings ---
Security Level: [Standard/Safer/Safest]
HTTPS-Only Mode: [Enabled/Disabled]

--- Tor Network Verification ---
Tor Connected: [Yes/No]
Exit IP: [IP address or Not available]

--- Audit Metadata ---
Audit Date: [current date]
Auditor: Security Consultant
